titles.title: Holy, Holy, Holy! Lord God Almighty!

authors.author: Reginald Heber
John Bacchus Dykes
Heilig, heilig, heilig! Gott, dir sei Ehre

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Holy, Holy, Holy! Lord God Almighty! Early in the morning Our song shall rise to Thee;

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Holy, Holy, Holy! Merciful and Mighty! God in Three Persons, Blessed Trinity!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Holy, Holy, Holy! All the saints adore Thee, Casting down their golden Crowns a round the glassy sea;

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Cherubim and seraphim Falling down before Thee, Which wert and art, and Evermore shalt be.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Holy, Holy, Holy! Tho' the darkness hide Thee, Tho' the eye of sinful man Thy Glory may not see,

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Only Thou art holy; there is none beside Thee Perfect in power, in Love, and purity.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Holy, Holy, Holy! Lord God Almighty! All Thy works shall praise Thy name, in

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Earth, and sky, and sea; Merciful and Mighty! God in Three Persons, Blessed Trinity!
